info.title: CH VACD FHIR API CapabilityStatement for server

/metadata.summary: Access to the Server's Capability Statement
/metadata.description: All FHIR Servers return a CapabilityStatement that describes what services they perform

get.summary: Return the server's capability statement

/AllergyIntolerance.summary: Manager for resources of type AllergyIntolerance
/AllergyIntolerance.description: The Manager for resources of type AllergyIntolerance: provides services to manage the collection of all the AllergyIntolerance instances

get.summary: Search all resources of type AllergyIntolerance based on a set of criteria

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Code that identifies the allergy or intolerance

parameters.name: patient
parameters.description: Who the sensitivity is for

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Any identifier for the AllergyIntolerance.

requestBody.description: The new state of the resource

200.description: the resource being returned after being updated

ETag.description: Version from Resource.meta.version as a weak ETag

/AllergyIntolerance/{rid}.description: Access to services to manage the state of a single resource of type AllergyIntolerance

/Patient.summary: Manager for resources of type Patient
/Patient.description: The Manager for resources of type Patient: provides services to manage the collection of all the Patient instances

get.summary: Search all resources of type Patient based on a set of criteria

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the HumanName, including family, give, prefix, suffix, suffix, and/or text

parameters.name: family
parameters.description: A portion of the family name of the patient

parameters.name: given
parameters.description: A portion of the given name of the patient

parameters.name: birthdate
parameters.description: The patient's date of birth

parameters.name: gender
parameters.description: Gender of the patient

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: A patient identifier

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: A server defined search that may match any of the string fields in the Address, including line, city, district, state, country, postalCode, and/or text

requestBody.description: The new state of the resource

200.description: the resource being returned after being updated

ETag.description: Version from Resource.meta.version as a weak ETag

get.summary: $document on type Composition
get.description: A client can ask a server to generate a fully bundled document from a composition resource. The server takes the composition resource, locates all the referenced resources and other additional resources as configured or requested and either returns a full document bundle, or returns an error. Note that since this is a search operation, the document bundle is  wrapped inside the search bundle.  If some of the resources are located on other servers, it is at the discretion of the  server whether to retrieve them or return an error. If the correct version of the document  that would be generated already exists, then the server can return the existing one.

/Composition/{rid}/$document.description: Operation $document on an instance of Composition

get.summary: $document on Composition instance
get.description: A client can ask a server to generate a fully bundled document from a composition resource. The server takes the composition resource, locates all the referenced resources and other additional resources as configured or requested and either returns a full document bundle, or returns an error. Note that since this is a search operation, the document bundle is  wrapped inside the search bundle.  If some of the resources are located on other servers, it is at the discretion of the  server whether to retrieve them or return an error. If the correct version of the document  that would be generated already exists, then the server can return the existing one.

get.summary: $export-document on type Patient
get.description: Generate export document according to the selected export type

requestBody.description: The batch or transaction

summary.name: _summary
summary.description: Requests the server to return a designated subset of the resource

format.name: _format
format.description: Specify alternative response formats by their MIME-types (when a client is unable acccess accept: header)

pretty.name: _pretty
pretty.description: Ask for a pretty printed response for human convenience

elements.name: _elements
elements.description: Requests the server to return a collection of elements from the resource

count.name: _count
count.description: The maximum number of search results on a page. The server is not bound to return the number requested, but cannot return more
